_comment: Non-money guardrails for the AI agents: per-agent MODEL PINNING and COST CAPS. Model resolution order = perAgent.model -> the agent's model in agents.json -> defaultModel (aliases like 'automatic'/'large'/'small' are mapped below). Cost caps are enforced from real token usage using the pricing table; spend is metered per agent per UTC day via the existing AgentPerformanceLog entity. Raise/lower caps here with no code change. Prices are USD per 1,000 tokens — update them if your provider's pricing changes or you switch providers.
